name: HeyGen
description: HeyGen AI video generation platform using the current v3 API first: Avatar IV/V video generation, image-to-video, Video Agent prompt-to-video, voices/TTS, avatar creation, assets, video translation, lipsync, webhooks, and legacy Studio/template APIs where v3 has no replacement.

tools.name: create_video_agent_v3
tools.description: Create a video with HeyGen Video Agent v3. One prompt can produce a finished video; optional avatar, voice, style, brand kit, and files steer the result. Poll returned video_id with get_video.

prompt.description: Natural-language description of the video to create.

mode.description: generate is one-shot; chat allows multi-turn revision.

avatar_id.description: Optional avatar look id from list_avatar_looks.

style_id.description: Optional style id from HeyGen video agent styles.

files.description: Optional asset inputs, max 20. Each entry is {type:"url"|"asset_id"|"base64", ...}.

incognito_mode.description: Disable memory injection/extraction for this session.

tools.name: video_agent_generate
tools.description: Older one-shot video generation via the v1 Video Agent. Takes a natural-language prompt plus optional config (avatar, duration, orientation) and asset references. Kept for backward compatibility; for new integrations prefer create_video_agent_v3.

prompt.description: Natural-language description of the video you want to create.

config.description: Optional generation config. Fields: avatar_id (string), duration_sec (integer, min 5), orientation ('portrait' | 'landscape').

files.description: Array of asset references the agent can incorporate. Each entry: {"asset_id": "..."}

callback_id.description: Custom identifier echoed back in completion webhooks.

callback_url.description: Webhook URL to notify when the video finishes generating.

tools.name: create_video
tools.description: Create a HeyGen v3 video from an avatar look or an arbitrary image. Supports Avatar IV/V engines, script+voice or audio lip-sync, backgrounds, captions, mp4/webm output, and async polling via get_video.

type.description: Use avatar for a saved avatar look, image for one-off image-to-video.

avatar_id.description: Avatar look id from list_avatar_looks. Required when type=avatar.

image.description: Image input when type=image: {type:"url",url} or {type:"asset_id",asset_id} or {type:"base64",data}.

background.description: Background setting: color/image/video input depending on HeyGen support.

script.description: Text script. Mutually exclusive with audio_url/audio_asset_id.

voice_id.description: Voice id from list_voices. Required for image/script; optional for avatars with default voice.

audio_url.description: Public audio URL for lip-sync. Mutually exclusive with script.

audio_asset_id.description: Uploaded audio asset id for lip-sync. Mutually exclusive with script.

voice_settings.description: Voice settings: speed, pitch, volume, locale, engine_settings.

motion_prompt.description: Avatar IV-only body motion prompt; do not use with engine.type=avatar_v.

engine.description: Engine selector, e.g. {type:"avatar_v"} or {type:"avatar_iv"}. Omit for HeyGen default.

tools.name: generate_studio_video
tools.description: Legacy v2 Studio multi-scene generator. Keep for older Studio/template workflows; for new single-scene avatar/image videos use create_video (POST /v3/videos), and for prompt-to-video use create_video_agent_v3.

video_inputs.description: Array of scene inputs. Each entry: { character: {type: 'avatar'|'talking_photo', avatar_id: '...', avatar_style: 'normal'|'closeUp'}, voice: {type: 'text', input_text: '...', voice_id: '...'}, background: {type: 'color'|'image'|'video', value: '#hex' or url: '...'} }

test.description: Generate a free watermarked test video. Leave unset / false when you're sure you want to spend credits.

callback_id.description: Custom callback id for webhook notifications.

tools.name: create_webm_video
tools.description: Generate a WebM-format avatar video with transparent background (true alpha channel). Ideal for overlays and web embedding where you need the avatar to composite over existing content.

input_text.description: Text for the avatar to speak (provide this OR input_audio).

input_audio.description: URL or asset id of pre-recorded audio (alternative to input_text + voice_id).

tools.name: get_video
tools.description: Get/poll a HeyGen v3 video by id. Returns status, video_url, thumbnail/gif/subtitle URLs, duration, and failure details.

video_id.description: Video id returned by create_video or create_video_agent_v3.

tools.name: list_videos
tools.description: List HeyGen v3 videos with pagination and optional folder/title filtering.

tools.name: delete_video
tools.description: Delete a HeyGen v3 video by id.

tools.name: get_sharable_url
tools.description: Get a non-expiring shareable URL for a completed video — useful for embedding the video on external sites or sharing with users who don't have a HeyGen account.

tools.name: list_avatar_looks
tools.description: List HeyGen v3 avatar looks. The look id is the avatar_id for create_video; supported_api_engines indicates Avatar V eligibility.

tools.name: get_avatar_look
tools.description: Fetch a HeyGen v3 avatar look, including default_voice_id and supported_api_engines.

tools.name: list_avatar_groups
tools.description: List HeyGen v3 avatar groups/identities.

tools.name: list_avatars_in_group
tools.description: List every avatar inside a specific avatar group.

tools.name: list_voices
tools.description: List HeyGen v3 voices. Use engine=starfish for TTS-compatible voices.

tools.name: list_voice_locales
tools.description: List every BCP-47 locale code supported by the voice library (e.g. en-US, es-MX, fr-FR, ja-JP). Used with voice_settings.locale on generate_video to control pronunciation.

tools.name: list_brand_voices
tools.description: List Brand Glossary entries — custom pronunciation and translation rules applied when using brand_voice_id on translate_video or generate_proofread.

tools.name: update_brand_voice
tools.description: Update a Brand Glossary entry to add/modify custom terms and pronunciation rules used during video translation.

terms.description: Array of custom term objects: {term: 'string', pronunciation: 'string', translation_hints: {'es': 'string', ...}}

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List every video template created under the account. Each template defines a video structure with variables you can fill in to produce custom videos.

tools.name: get_template
tools.description: Fetch a template's definition including all variables that can be replaced during generation. Use the V3 variant (get_template_v3) to also see per-scene variable mappings for templates created in the New AI Studio.

tools.name: get_template_v3
tools.description: Fetch a template's V3 definition — same as get_template but also returns the scenes field mapping each variable to the scene where it's used. Required for templates created in HeyGen's New AI Studio.

tools.name: generate_from_template
tools.description: Generate a video from a template with dynamic variable substitution. Call get_template first to see the full list of variables you need to supply.

variables.description: Map of variable names to values: {name1: {name: 'name1', type: 'text', properties: {content: '...'}}, ...}. Shape depends on the variable's type (text, image, video, audio) — see the template definition from get_template.

test.description: Generate a free watermarked test video.

tools.name: translate_video
tools.description: Translate a video into one of 175+ target languages with natural-sounding voice and accurate lip-sync. Returns video_translate_id to poll via get_translation_status. For translation with human-in-the-loop review, use the proofread family (generate_proofread → download_proofread_srt → upload_proofread_srt → generate_video_from_proofread).

video_url.description: Source video URL. Supports direct file URLs, Google Drive, and YouTube.

speaker_num.description: Number of distinct speakers in the video (improves diarization accuracy).

brand_voice_id.description: Brand Glossary id to apply custom translation/pronunciation rules.

translate_audio_only.description: Return a translated audio track only, skipping video lip-sync.

tools.name: get_translation_status
tools.description: Poll a video translation job until status is completed or failed.

tools.name: list_target_languages
tools.description: List every supported target language for video translation with display names and language codes.

tools.name: get_translation_caption
tools.description: Download the caption (SRT) file for a completed translated video — useful for re-uploading the captions elsewhere or displaying them alongside the video.

tools.name: generate_proofread
tools.description: Generate a translation proofread — HeyGen translates the video and produces an SRT file for human review before the final lip-synced video is made. Use this for higher-quality translations where you want to correct the transcription before HeyGen commits to a final output. Returns a proofread_id. Scale or Enterprise plan only.

video_url.description: Source video URL. Supports direct file URLs, Google Drive, and YouTube.

output_language.description: Single target language (use output_languages for batch).

output_languages.description: Multiple target languages for batch proofread generation.

folder_id.description: Target folder id where the proofread should be stored.

enable_video_stretching.description: Dynamic duration adjustment for better lip-sync.

tools.name: get_proofread_status
tools.description: Poll a proofread generation job until the SRT is ready for download/review.

tools.name: download_proofread_srt
tools.description: Get a download URL for the SRT file of a completed proofread. The agent/user reviews and edits the SRT, then uploads the corrected version via upload_proofread_srt.

tools.name: upload_proofread_srt
tools.description: Upload a corrected SRT file back to an existing proofread via a presigned URL HeyGen returns. After this succeeds, call generate_video_from_proofread to produce the final lip-synced video.

tools.name: generate_video_from_proofread
tools.description: Produce the final translated video from an approved proofread. Returns a video_translate_id you can poll via get_translation_status.

tools.name: create_photo_avatar
tools.description: Generate a personalized AI avatar from text prompts and attribute inputs. The result is a new photo avatar you can use with generate_video.

appearance.description: Free-text appearance description ('short brown hair, glasses, casual shirt').

tools.name: create_photo_avatar_group
tools.description: Create a photo avatar group — a container for multiple looks of the same avatar subject. Used before train_photo_avatar_group and add_looks_to_photo_avatar_group.

image_key.description: Initial photo image_key from a previously-uploaded asset.

tools.name: add_looks_to_photo_avatar_group
tools.description: Add additional look images to an existing photo avatar group. Used to feed HeyGen more photos of the same person for higher-quality avatar training.

image_keys.description: Array of image_key strings from uploaded assets.

tools.name: train_photo_avatar_group
tools.description: Initiate the training process for a photo avatar group. HeyGen builds an AI model from the group's photos so the avatar is consistent across generated looks. Poll get_training_job_status.

tools.name: get_training_job_status
tools.description: Poll a photo avatar training job until status is done.

tools.name: generate_photo_avatar_looks
tools.description: Generate additional looks (new images) for a trained photo avatar group. Produces variations in pose/expression/setting while keeping the same subject identity.

prompt.description: Free-text description of the new look ('wearing a black suit in an office').

tools.name: add_photo_avatar_motion
tools.description: Add motion/animation to a still photo avatar look — converts a static image into a subtly animated one that looks alive. Precondition for using the photo avatar in video generation with non-trivial movement.

tools.name: get_photo_look_status
tools.description: Check the generation status of a photo avatar look (for create_photo_avatar, generate_photo_avatar_looks, or add_photo_avatar_motion).

tools.name: delete_photo_avatar
tools.description: Delete a single photo avatar look by id.

tools.name: delete_photo_avatar_group
tools.description: Delete an entire photo avatar group (along with every look inside it). Irreversible.

tools.name: create_digital_twin
tools.description: Create a digital twin avatar from training footage. Submit a training-footage video URL and a consent-statement video URL; HeyGen builds a lifelike avatar of the person that can be used like any other avatar_id in generate_video. Training takes several minutes to hours — poll via get_digital_twin_status.

training_footage_url.description: Public URL of the training footage video (typically 2-5 min of the person speaking to camera).

video_consent_url.description: Public URL of the consent-statement video.

tools.name: get_digital_twin_status
tools.description: Poll a digital twin training job.

tools.name: delete_digital_twin
tools.description: Delete a digital twin avatar by id.

tools.name: legacy_list_assets
tools.description: Legacy v1 asset list endpoint. Prefer upload_asset/get_asset/delete_asset for v3 asset workflows.

token.description: Pagination token from the previous response.

tools.name: delete_asset
tools.description: Delete a HeyGen v3 asset.

tools.name: create_folder
tools.description: Create a new folder under the account for organizing videos, assets, and templates.

parent_id.description: Parent folder id. Omit for root-level folder.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List folders with filtering by parent and name. Use is_trash=true to view trashed folders.

is_trash.description: Return trashed folders instead of live ones.

tools.name: update_folder
tools.description: Rename an existing folder.

tools.name: trash_folder
tools.description: Move a folder to the trash (soft delete — restorable via restore_folder).

tools.name: restore_folder
tools.description: Restore a previously trashed folder, returning it to its original location.

tools.name: get_current_user
tools.description: Get current HeyGen v3 user, wallet, and subscription information.

tools.name: get_remaining_quota
tools.description: Get the account's remaining API credit quota. Check this before starting expensive operations (digital twin training, batch translation, large template generation) to avoid mid-job credit exhaustion.

tools.name: add_webhook_endpoint
tools.description: Register a webhook endpoint to receive real-time notifications when videos complete, translations finish, etc. Events list available via list_available_webhook_events.

url.description: HTTPS endpoint URL that will receive POST notifications.

tools.name: list_webhook_endpoints
tools.description: List every registered webhook endpoint with its id, URL, and subscribed events.

tools.name: update_webhook_endpoint
tools.description: Update a webhook endpoint's URL or event subscriptions.

tools.name: delete_webhook_endpoint
tools.description: Delete a webhook endpoint by id. Events will stop flowing to the URL.

tools.name: list_available_webhook_events
tools.description: List every webhook event type HeyGen supports, so you know what to subscribe to when calling add_webhook_endpoint.

tools.name: create_avatar
tools.description: Create a HeyGen v3 prompt, photo, or digital twin avatar. Training is async; poll the group/look status.

tools.name: create_speech
tools.description: Generate HeyGen v3 speech audio from plain text or SSML using a voice id.

tools.name: upload_asset
tools.description: Upload a HeyGen v3 asset for reuse. Supports images, video, audio, and PDF.

file.description: Multipart file upload field or platform-supported file reference.

tools.name: get_asset
tools.description: Get HeyGen v3 asset metadata and URL.

tools.name: create_video_translation
tools.description: Create HeyGen v3 video translations in one or more target languages. Use speed or precision mode; poll get_video_translation.

tools.name: get_video_translation
tools.description: Get/poll a HeyGen v3 video translation job.

tools.name: list_supported_translation_languages
tools.description: List HeyGen v3 video translation target languages.

tools.name: create_lipsync
tools.description: Create a HeyGen v3 lipsync job by replacing/dubbing audio on a source video. Poll with get_lipsync.

tools.name: get_lipsync
tools.description: Get/poll a HeyGen v3 lipsync job.

tools.name: list_lipsyncs
tools.description: List HeyGen v3 lipsync jobs.

events.name: photo_avatar.success
events.description: Photo avatar generation / training / look completed.

events.name: photo_avatar.fail
events.description: Photo avatar generation / training / look failed.
